_publications._publicationTitle: Electrical stimulation of Schwann cells on electrospun hyaluronic acid carbon nanotube fibers.

_contextSnippet: Cellular proliferation was measured using an Alamar blue assay at 24, 48 and 72 hours post cell seeding
details: Successfully used for Alamar Blue proliferation assays at 24, 48 and 72 hours post cell seeding
